# Copilot Instructions

This project is a team website built using HTML and CSS.

## General Guidelines
- Use clean, readable, and well-structured HTML
- Follow semantic HTML practices (header, nav, main, section, footer)
- Keep code simple and understandable

## Design Requirements
- Create a modern and visually appealing layout
- Use consistent colors, spacing, and typography
- Ensure the website looks clean and user-friendly

## Navigation
- Include a navigation bar (navbar) at the top of every page
- Navbar must contain links to all pages (index, team members)
- Navigation should be consistent across all pages

## Styling
- Use a single shared CSS file (style.css)
- Ensure consistent styling across all pages
- Add hover effects and spacing for better UI

## Team Pages
- Each team member should have a separate section or page
- Use the same layout and styles as the main page
- Display name, role, and short description

## Responsiveness
- Make the layout responsive (works on mobile and desktop)
- Use flexible layouts (flexbox)

## Code Quality
- Keep indentation clean
- Avoid unnecessary code duplication
- Write simple and maintainable code
